title: Senior Plant Manager at Amara Raja Batteries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Amara Raja Batteries
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Amara Raja Batteries in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amara Raja Batteries:
Amara Raja Batteries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries!
